overall_verdict.summary: No Paper-24-Step-D-style hidden continuous kappa parameter was found. The main risks are scope compression, conditional-premise visibility, and stale cross-paper numerical references.

A_Rddot_and_Lambda_dropout.verdict: No hidden parameter. Derived/scoped on the physical hidden-support variable.

candidates.rigidity: Forced by local OS support IVP and inward acceleration at the clamp.
Forced by differentiating Rdot^2 = c^2(r_s/R - 1).
Fixed by Schwarzschild hidden-support geometry from M_U.
Torsion-Lambda scaling contributes a constant to Rdot^2 and disappears from Rddot.

A_Rddot_and_Lambda_dropout.anti_fit: Not fitted to observation; value follows from M_U -> r_s and the support IVP.

B_xcrit.verdict: No hidden parameter. Derived/scoped on the active reduced scalar optical-history observer class.

candidates.rigidity: Delta = Q x^4 and boundary Delta = 1 force x_crit = Q^(-1/4).
Q enters the multiplicative Delta identity; K_gauge is its logarithm, not the primitive boundary scalar here.
Zero visibility/admissibility boundary in the reduced optical-history map.

B_xcrit.anti_fit: No observational target is used to choose x_crit.

C_cycle_and_restart.verdict: No hidden fitted scalar. Recollapse time is derived; full cycle and hard restart are conditional.

candidates.rigidity: Forced by OS parametrization of the local recollapse IVP.
Requires symmetric application of the Paper 1/Poplawski bounce law.
Conditional on high-density EC/Poplawski attachment criterion.
Requires semantic-restoration selector package and selected seed optical branch.
Moment/recurrence selectors force beta=lambda=1 only within a chosen seed branch.

C_cycle_and_restart.anti_fit: 111/222 Gyr are geometry-derived from r_s; hard restart is conditional, not fitted.

D_KB7_DtN_open_transport.verdict: No fitted scalar. KB.7 is valid only as DERIVED/SCOPED on the active reduced scalar source block.

candidates.rigidity: Typed boundary-to-bulk theorem and source-class lock restrict P4 to the active source/readout block.
Supported by later P4 alpha/source-class repair artifacts on the active reduced source map.
P4 alpha-class repair fixes line/one-form primitive observable class.
Local payload lock theorem fixes the one-dimensional scalar channel to Q.
Too broad unless explicitly scoped to the active source block.

D_KB7_DtN_open_transport.anti_fit: No observation-fitted scalar in KB.7; risk is category/scope.

E_universal_GMP.verdict: No hidden fit. GMP is closed on realized typed bridge observables and characterized/no-go outside.

candidates.rigidity: Typed carrier separates bridge-placement observables from non-bridge history/solver sectors.
No puncture-load-to-channel predicate exists in history/solver sectors.
Explicit identity-spatial-leg bypass classes kill universal GMP on full local algebra.

E_universal_GMP.anti_fit: No observational comparison; typed algebraic classification.

F_Premise2.verdict: Premise 2 remains founding premise; no derivation found, but one wording family risks hidden premise-upgrade.

candidates.rigidity: Not derivable inside Paper 32; admitted bedrock assumption.
Paper 32 language mostly says suggestive, not theorem-grade.
Should be narrowed to avoid implying Premise 2 is derived.

G_semiclassical_principles.verdict: All four are retired only on stated scopes; no hidden fit found.

items.scope: bridge-readable quotient, not full ambient extension

H_open_problem_closures.verdict: Closed or characterized on stated scopes. v1.5 should avoid unscoped 'all problems closed' wording.

items.scope: imported/reduced history under Premise 2 and observable-map assumptions
closed on realized typed bridge class; no-go on larger abstract local algebra
extended fermionic/chiral IO-EC theory plus restart selectors

stale_items.location_hint: Appendix A steps 208/211/212 in Paper 32 v1.4
stale_items.issue: Older YPBBN-era D/H, Y_p, chi^2, and Li-7 benchmark values should be refreshed to corrected YPCMB convention.

stale_items.location_hint: Body scorecard and Appendix A Paper 24 steps
stale_items.issue: Paper 24 v2.3 Henderson primary import row supersedes older cluster-deformation scorecard wording.
Paper 34 v1.1 later addresses this under scoped extension premises; Paper 32 v1.5 should either remain historically scoped or add a forward note.

v1_5_recommendations: Add Scope and Open Premises section.
State KB.7/P4 as DERIVED/SCOPED on active reduced scalar source block only.
State SP-2 quotient scope and SP-4 realized typed bridge scope explicitly.
State hard restart as conditional on semantic-restoration selector package and selected seed optical branch.
State Premise 2 remains a founding premise and is not derived.
Refresh Papers 19-25 BBN scorecard references and Paper 24 v2.3 lithium row.
Avoid unscoped 'all open problems closed' wording; use 'closed or characterized on stated scopes'.
